title: gutierrezia sarothrae
intro: Gutierrezia sarothrae, also known as bitter broom or greasewood, is a shrub native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and a strong, bitter scent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gutierrezia sarothrae include relief from digestive problems, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of Gutierrezia sarothrae are typically made from its dried flowers and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
